relations.subject: Coqui francolin
relations.evidence: It is mainly found in Africa's southern half but is also sparsely present in the western Sahel and Ethiopia

relations.subject: Coqui francolin
relations.evidence: It mainly inhabits grasslands, steppes, savannas and dry scrubland, but also bright forest and grain fields
